query: UPDATE campaignContacts SET tier = 'tier1_hot' WHERE campaignId = 1 AND titleRelevance = 'blasting_specialist' AND title IS NOT NULL; UPDATE campaignContacts SET tier = 'tier2_warm' WHERE campaignId = 1 AND titleRelevance = 'decision_maker' AND title IS NOT NULL AND tier != 'tier1_hot'; UPDATE campaignContacts SET tier = 'tier3_enrich' WHERE campaignId = 1 AND titleRelevance = 'operations' AND title IS NOT NULL AND tier = 'tier4_low'; SELECT tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts WHERE campaignId = 1 GROUP BY tier ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute UPDATE campaignContacts SET tier = 'tier1_hot' WHERE campaignId = 1 AND titleRelevance = 'blasting_specialist' AND title IS NOT NULL; UPDATE campaignContacts SET tier = 'tier2_warm' WHERE campaignId = 1 AND titleRelevance = 'decision_maker' AND title IS NOT NULL AND tier != 'tier1_hot'; UPDATE campaignContacts SET tier = 'tier3_enrich' WHERE campaignId = 1 AND titleRelevance = 'operations' AND title IS NOT NULL AND tier = 'tier4_low'; SELECT tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts WHERE campaignId = 1 GROUP BY tier ORDER BY cnt DESC;
stdout:
